seo.title: Services
seo.description: Explore the full range of remittance, mobile money, and payment services offered by Abjatal Star.

header.title: Financial Services You Can Trust
header.subtitle: From international remittances to local mobile money, we provide comprehensive payment solutions for individuals and businesses.

servicesSection.title: Comprehensive Financial Services
servicesSection.description: From international remittances to local mobile money, Abjatal Star provides a full range of payment solutions for individuals and businesses.

partnersSection.title: Trusted Global & Local Payment Partners
partnersSection.description: We work with the world's leading remittance and mobile money providers to deliver fast, secure financial services you can rely on.

items.title: International Money Transfer
items.description: Send money to family and friends abroad through Western Union, MoneyGram, and Ria with secure processing and real-time tracking.

items.title: Receive Money
items.description: Collect international remittances quickly at any Abjatal Star branch. Bring your valid ID and transaction reference to receive your cash.

items.title: Orange Money Cash-In & Cash-Out
items.description: Deposit and withdraw funds from your Orange Money wallet at our authorized agent locations across the country.

items.title: Mobile Money Agent Services
items.description: Full Afrimoney and local mobile money agent support for transfers, balance inquiries, and account management.

items.title: Local Money Transfer
items.description: Send money domestically to friends, family, or business partners through our secure local transfer network.

items.title: Business Payment Support
items.description: Dedicated payment solutions for businesses, including bulk transfers, supplier payments, and payroll support services.

items.title: Bill Payment Assistance
items.description: Pay utility bills, school fees, and other recurring payments conveniently at any Abjatal Star branch or agent location.

items.title: Agent & Branch Support
items.description: Our trained agents and branch staff provide hands-on assistance for every transaction, ensuring a smooth experience.

partners.name: Western Union
partners.description: Send and receive money worldwide through one of the most trusted global transfer networks.

partners.name: MoneyGram
partners.description: Fast international money transfers to over 200 countries with competitive exchange rates.

partners.name: Ria Money Transfer
partners.description: Reliable cross-border remittance services with quick delivery and transparent fees.

partners.name: Orange Money
partners.description: Convenient mobile wallet cash-in and cash-out services for everyday transactions.

partners.name: Afrimoney / Mobile Money
partners.description: Local mobile money agent services for deposits, withdrawals, and peer transfers.

partners.name: Local Mobile Money
partners.description: Nationwide cash-in and cash-out support through our authorized agent network.
